title: Transformers x Evangelion: Transformers mode “EVA”
wikitext:
{{expand}}
Transformers x Evangelion: Transformers mode “EVA” or Transformers mode “EVA” for short is an online story of the crossover of Transformers x Evangelion <ref> http://www.zonebase.org/2017/10/transformers-mode-eva-chapters-1-4.html?m=1</ref>

==Story==
===Chapter 1===
{{expand}}


==Notes==
*While not see in the artwork Autobot Skylynx appears in the story who brought the Autobots to Earth who is transformer that transformers into a shuttle, split apart into dinobird and lynx which can combine together. However he wasn’t seen helping the Autobots against Angel-scream.
*In Transformers series the universe of this story takes place in Primax 514.23 Iota labed after when the first chapter came out.
*It's unkown if Shinji was piloting Unit-1 during the story or was operated remotely as the only Evangelion character appeared was Misato and the Angel (Before Starscream possessed it),  Shijni was not implied nor mentioned at all during this story.
*Starcream's death in the "Unicron Wars" is obously a reference to the Transformers movie Transformers: The movie where he met his end at the hand of the Decepticon Galvatron after he tossesd him out of the shuttle Astrotrain as Megatron before being rebuilt by Unicrom into Galvatron and Starscream was able to possess other beings in such in "Starscream's ghost" for exmaple which why he was able to possess the Angel.
**However since Optimus Prime and Wheeljack are alive in this story since they died in said movie it's most likely events similar to it that happened
**Galvatron was mentioned in this story that Starcream planned to use his new Angel body on Galvatron after dealing with Optimus Prime implying it was Galvatron who killed him off screen before posesesing the Angel
*Optimus Prime compares Toyko-3 to Scramble City which is the Japanese name of the giant Autobot Metroplex
*Optimus Prime mentions he will not allow another event like the Second Impact to happen again implying the Autobots know some knowledge on it and the Angels.
*Optimus Prime mentions he can feel some life form in EVA Unit-1 most likely it's mysterous and orgnic nature.

==External links==
*[https://web.archive.org/web/20160403072603/http://takaratomymall.jp/special/tfeva/story04.html ''Transformers Mode "Eva"'' chapter 4 at TakaraTomy Mall (Archive)]
*[https://mohairtranslations.wordpress.com/2020/09/11/translation-transformers-mode-eva/ Translation: Transformers Mode “Eva”] at Mohair Translations

{{cleanup}}
{{stub}}

Transformers x Evangelion: Transformers mode “EVA” or Transformers mode “EVA” for short is an online story of the crossover of Transformers x Evangelion [1]

Contents

  • 1 Story
    • 1.1 Chapter 1
  • 2 Notes
  • 3 External links

Story[edit]

Chapter 1[edit]

"Making something... Nurturing something is really great. You can see and learn so many things from the process."
Please help improve this article or section by expanding it.
If you have questions on what to improve/expand, please discuss on the talk page.


Notes[edit]

  • While not see in the artwork Autobot Skylynx appears in the story who brought the Autobots to Earth who is transformer that transformers into a shuttle, split apart into dinobird and lynx which can combine together. However he wasn’t seen helping the Autobots against Angel-scream.
  • In Transformers series the universe of this story takes place in Primax 514.23 Iota labed after when the first chapter came out.
  • It's unkown if Shinji was piloting Unit-1 during the story or was operated remotely as the only Evangelion character appeared was Misato and the Angel (Before Starscream possessed it), Shijni was not implied nor mentioned at all during this story.
  • Starcream's death in the "Unicron Wars" is obously a reference to the Transformers movie Transformers: The movie where he met his end at the hand of the Decepticon Galvatron after he tossesd him out of the shuttle Astrotrain as Megatron before being rebuilt by Unicrom into Galvatron and Starscream was able to possess other beings in such in "Starscream's ghost" for exmaple which why he was able to possess the Angel.
    • However since Optimus Prime and Wheeljack are alive in this story since they died in said movie it's most likely events similar to it that happened
    • Galvatron was mentioned in this story that Starcream planned to use his new Angel body on Galvatron after dealing with Optimus Prime implying it was Galvatron who killed him off screen before posesesing the Angel
  • Optimus Prime compares Toyko-3 to Scramble City which is the Japanese name of the giant Autobot Metroplex
  • Optimus Prime mentions he will not allow another event like the Second Impact to happen again implying the Autobots know some knowledge on it and the Angels.
  • Optimus Prime mentions he can feel some life form in EVA Unit-1 most likely it's mysterous and orgnic nature.

External links[edit]

  • Transformers Mode "Eva" chapter 4 at TakaraTomy Mall (Archive)
  • Translation: Transformers Mode “Eva” at Mohair Translations
